{{- /* manifest-url shortcode Emits the absolute URL of a manifest file. Use inside code fences where the full manifests shortcode would render too much. Usage (inside a shell code fence): kubectl delete -f {{< manifest-url "platform/inference-gateway.yaml" >}} */ -}} {{- $path := .Get 0 -}} {{- if not $path -}} {{- errorf "manifest-url shortcode requires a path argument at %s" .Position -}} {{- end -}} {{- $resource := resources.Get (printf "examples/%s" $path) -}} {{- if not $resource -}} {{- errorf "manifest-url shortcode: examples/%s not found (called from %s)" $path .Position -}} {{- end -}} {{- ($resource | resources.Copy (printf "examples/%s" $path)).Permalink -}}
